scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R index.html records.html app.js records.js styles.css records.css assets _headers dist/
scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check records.js && node --check functions/api/diagnosis-tags.js && node --check functions/api/diagnosis-records.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --functions=functions
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name ryujin-diagnosis
